name: Smoky Tomato Ketchup
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds ripe tomatoes, coarsely chopped (or 3 28 oz. cans crushed tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large nonreactive pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally until the vegetables are soft and the sauce is reduced by 1/4.
4. Puree in a food processor.
5. Strain through a sieve into a clean pot.
6. Bring to a boil over medium-low heat and simmer (partially covered to prevent splatters) for 1 hour or until quite thick and dark brownish red.
7. Store in the refrigerator for up to 1 month. Freeze for longer storage.
